title: Croparium: The Aether
description: Grow Aether ores via Holy Stone farmlands—just like the things you do with wheat!
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/12a7ee947a9384c1ef9a8d65c282ec0d66c00983.png)

**Required Dependencies:** [**Croparium**](https://modrinth.com/mod/croparium) & [**the Aether**](https://modrinth.com/mod/aether)

**Optional Dependency:** [**Deep Aether**](https://modrinth.com/mod/deep-aether)

**_Functions & Operations​_**

This mod enables the planting of minerals from the "the aether" mod and (optionally) the "deep aether" mod. 

**Farmland Cultivation**

Hold any type of pickaxe in your main hand and right-click on "Holy Stone" to convert it into "Holy Stone Farmland"—this is the only planting medium for Aether ore crops.​

**Farmland Moisture Requirement**

Similar to vanilla Minecraft farmland, the cultivated "Holy Stone Farmland" needs water existing within a 4-block horizontal range to stay moist to support crop growth. 

If the water source is removed, the farmland will turn back to holystone.

**_Additional Note_**

For details such as methods for obtaining ore seeds, specific planting steps, and crop growth stages and cycles, please refer to  "[**Croparium**](https://modrinth.com/mod/croparium)" main mod.
